name: Trianglet
description: A scatter of tiny centred triangles in varying size and spin, re-seeding their shower each redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 45deg, 90deg, 135deg, 180deg, 225deg, 270deg, 315deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; @size: @rand(40%, 78%); -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(@var(--rot)); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
